subtitle: Convert code to diagrams
desc: Already have Mermaid code in your doc? Render everything in one click.

steps.title: Write Mermaid syntax
steps.desc: Place your diagram code inside a code block or fenced ```mermaid block in your Google Doc.

steps.title: Run the renderer
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Code to Diagrams.

steps.title: Preview and insert
steps.desc: Preview each diagram, then click Insert After or Replace to swap the code for a diagram.

subtitle: Use the built-in editor
desc: Write diagrams from scratch with live preview and templates.

steps.title: Open the editor
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Insert Mermaid Diagram.

steps.title: Write and preview
steps.desc: Write or paste Mermaid syntax on the left, see the rendered diagram update live on the right. Pick a template to get started quickly.

steps.title: Insert into your document
steps.desc: Click Insert into Document to place the diagram at your cursor, or Replace Diagram to update an existing one.

subtitle: Edit diagrams in place
desc: Click any diagram to edit its source — no copy-paste needed.

steps.title: Select a diagram
steps.desc: Click on any Mermaid diagram that was inserted by the add-on.

steps.title: Open the editor
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Edit Selected Mermaid Diagram.

steps.title: Edit and replace
steps.desc: The editor opens with the diagram's source code pre-loaded. Tweak it and click Replace Diagram.

subtitle: Convert diagrams back to code
desc: Extract the original Mermaid source from any diagram.

steps.title: Select a diagram or scan all
steps.desc: Click a single diagram, or use Convert All Diagrams to Code to extract from every diagram in the document.

steps.title: Run the extractor
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert Selected Diagram to Code (or Convert All).

steps.title: Get your code back
steps.desc: The original Mermaid code is inserted as a fenced code block right in your doc, ready to edit or share.

subtitle: Fix native "Copy as Markdown"
desc: Copied Mermaid code from a markdown file? Google Docs corrupts it. Fix it in one step.

steps.title: Open the fix tool
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Fix Native "Copy as Markdown".

steps.title: Paste your broken code
steps.desc: Paste the corrupted markdown into the text area. The tool shows a side-by-side diff of what it will fix.

steps.title: Copy the fixed result
steps.desc: Click Copy Fixed Markdown and paste it back into your doc — ready to render.
